scenes.title: 开篇点题
scenes.first_frame_prompt: A blank rice paper with a dark ink drop at center, the ink just starting to bleed outward, vast white space around, pure shuimo minimal composition, cinematic
scenes.motion_prompt: A single drop of ink falls and blooms into spreading concentric rings on rice paper

scenes.title: 青龙腾云
scenes.first_frame_prompt: A majestic Chinese Azure Dragon coiling through rolling eastern clouds at dawn, ink wash painting style, vast sea of clouds, golden sun rays from horizon, 16:9 wide shot
scenes.motion_prompt: The Azure Dragon flies forward through rolling clouds, its long body coiling and tail sweeping

subtitles.text: 东方 · 主木 · 司春

scenes.title: 龙首特写
scenes.first_frame_prompt: Close-up of a Chinese Azure Dragon head, deer antlers, flowing whiskers, sharp eyes, detailed scales, ink wash painting style, dramatic side lighting, 16:9
scenes.motion_prompt: The dragon head rises slowly, whiskers and mane flowing in the wind

subtitles.text: 兴云致雨 · 泽被苍生

scenes.title: 白虎踞山
scenes.first_frame_prompt: A mighty Chinese White Tiger crouching on a western mountain peak, ink wash painting style, swirling mist around, jagged peaks behind, 16:9 wide shot
scenes.motion_prompt: The White Tiger lifts its head and roars, body tensing, tail sweeping

subtitles.text: 西方 · 主金 · 司秋

scenes.title: 虎目特写
scenes.first_frame_prompt: Extreme close-up of a Chinese White Tiger face, 王 character on forehead, fierce round eyes, sharp fangs, ink wash painting style, high contrast, 16:9
scenes.motion_prompt: The tiger head turns slightly, eyes blazing, mouth opening to show fangs

subtitles.text: 百兽震惶 · 威震八方

scenes.title: 朱雀翔火
scenes.first_frame_prompt: A glorious Chinese Vermilion Bird with wings spread wide, flying through flame-like vermilion clouds in the southern sky, ink wash with crimson tints, 16:9 wide shot
scenes.motion_prompt: The Vermilion Bird spreads its wings and soars upward through flame-like clouds, long tail feathers trailing

subtitles.text: 南方 · 主火 · 司夏

scenes.title: 凤羽特写
scenes.first_frame_prompt: Close-up of a Chinese Vermilion Bird head with phoenix crown and neck feathers, crimson red ink bleeding into black, ink wash painting style, 16:9
scenes.motion_prompt: The bird head turns slightly, crown feathers swaying, neck feathers rippling

subtitles.text: 天下太平 · 光明永照

scenes.title: 玄武盘海
scenes.first_frame_prompt: A solemn Chinese Black Tortoise with serpent coiled around, resting on dark northern ocean with ice slabs, ink wash painting style, low angle, 16:9 wide shot
scenes.motion_prompt: The serpent head on the tortoise shell rises and flicks its forked tongue, waves churning below

subtitles.text: 北方 · 主水 · 司冬

scenes.title: 龟蛇交缠
scenes.first_frame_prompt: Close-up of Chinese Black Tortoise shell with deep burnt-ink crackled texture, a black serpent coiled around the shell, traditional shuimo heavy ink, 16:9
scenes.motion_prompt: The serpent body slowly tightens its coil around the tortoise shell, subtle movement

subtitles.text: 水德悠长 · 永镇北冥

scenes.title: 麒麟献瑞
scenes.first_frame_prompt: A celestial Chinese Qilin walking gracefully through auspicious rolling clouds in the central sky, warm ink with subtle golden-ochre tints, ink wash painting style, 16:9 wide shot
scenes.motion_prompt: The Qilin walks forward through auspicious clouds, hooves stepping gently

subtitles.text: 中央 · 主土 · 祥瑞之征

scenes.title: 麒麟角特写
scenes.first_frame_prompt: Close-up of a celestial Chinese Qilin head with curved deer antlers and single forehead horn, gentle wise eyes, warm ink with golden tints, shuimo style, 16:9
scenes.motion_prompt: The Qilin head raises gently, antlers tilting slightly, eyes looking forward with wisdom

subtitles.text: 万民同庆 · 太平有象

scenes.title: 五山收韵
scenes.first_frame_prompt: A distant panorama of five connected mountain peaks fading into mist, mountains in progressively lighter ink, faint golden light on the highest peak, vast white sky, shuimo atmospheric perspective, 16:9
scenes.motion_prompt: Mist slowly drifts across the five mountain peaks, golden light on the central peak growing slightly brighter

subtitles.text: 永耀古今 · 千秋不息
